achievements.title: Rick, You're Not Gonna Believe This!
achievements.description: Survive your first Velociraptor encounter, avoiding becoming its lunch on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Locker Room Talk
achievements.description: Obtain the DDK Code Disk, read the journal, and escape the Locker Room ambush without killing the Velociraptor or taking damage on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Oh, You've Got to Be Kidding Me!
achievements.description: Escape the T-Rex's jaws in the Chief's Room without firing a shot or taking damage on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: That's No Lizard, It's a Dinosaur!
achievements.description: Survive the DANGER sequence in the Lecture Room as Gail swoops in to save the day on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: So, Do We Have Power Yet?
achievements.description: Restore power to the Facility's underground levels, bringing light to the dino-filled depths on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Dr. Regina, MSc
achievements.description: Steal the identity of an unfortunate researcher on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: T-Rex's Odyssey
achievements.description: Restore power to the Large Size Elevator without consecutively operating consoles on the same side on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Judge, Jury and Executioner
achievements.description: Survive a Pteranodon's attempts to turn you into a smoothie and take down its partner on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: That Was Convenient!
achievements.description: Survive the most inconveniently timed earthquake near the Large Size Elevator on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Play Your Cards Right
achievements.description: Solve the crane puzzle in Carrying Out Room B1 in no more than 6 moves on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Bros Before Paleos
achievements.description: For the first choice, follow Rick's plan to track the distress signal and locate your missing comrade on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Farewell, We Hardly Knew Ye
achievements.description: Realize your efforts were in vain and that Gail's plan would've been the better choice on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Eyes on the Mission
achievements.description: For the first choice, follow Gail's plan and get your first glimpse of the mission's target on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Aggressive Elevator Pitch
achievements.description: Survive the elevator DANGER sequence to reach the main area of Hall B1 on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: No Time for Small Talk!
achievements.description: Obtain the B1 Key Chip without talking to the dying researcher, saving 30 seconds on your speedrun on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Medicine for a Good Samaritan
achievements.description: Open one of the emergency cases in the Medical Room on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: I Ain't No Free Lunch!
achievements.description: Survive the Velociraptor ambush in the Gas Experiment Room and exact your revenge on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Miniature Foreshadowing
achievements.description: Activate the Third Energy Simulator on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: It's a Unix System! I Know This!
achievements.description: For the second choice, follow Rick's plan and successfully escape through the Experiment Simulation Room hatch on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Time for Plan B
achievements.description: For the second choice, follow Rick's plan, fail to escape the Experiment Simulation Room, and fall back on Gail's plan on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: I'll Take Them All Out One by One!
achievements.description: For the second choice, follow Gail's plan to the letter by taking down all 8 Velociraptors on your way out of the Research Area on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: You Can't Do This! I Have Rights!
achievements.description: Apprehend Dr. Kirk on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Sorry Pal, I'm Busy!
achievements.description: Escape the T-Rex after activating the antenna without firing a shot or taking damage on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: There Goes Our Ride...
achievements.description: Watch helplessly as that damn T-Rex turns your ride home into scrap metal on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: I'm Kinda in a Hurry
achievements.description: Escape the T-Rex in the Heliport in under 30 seconds on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Look At This Absolute Unit
achievements.description: Survive your first encounter with the terrifying Therizinosaurus on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Heart of the Cards
achievements.description: Solve the crane puzzle in General Weapons Storage using no more than 4 turns and 15 moves on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: I Come In Peace
achievements.description: Obtain the B2 Key Chip 1 in the Security Pass Room without setting off the alarm on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Well That Was Anticlimactic
achievements.description: Witness a literal T-Rex emerge from the Large Size Elevator and electrocute itself on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Am I Late?
achievements.description: Wander aimlessly and miss the T-Rex's dramatic entrance at level B3 on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Lost and Found
achievements.description: Obtain a weapon from the Large Size Elevator after the T-Rex electrocutes itself on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Dino Droppings
achievements.description: Face another crushing disappointment as your ride home is denied once again on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: I'm Chillin', Tryna Stack These Hexillions
achievements.description: Solve the stack puzzle in the Security Pass Room in no more than 8 moves on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Password12345
achievements.description: Access the Third Energy Generator with the world's most narcissistic password on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: CSI Ibis Island
achievements.description: Obtain Dr. Kirk's fingerprint before meeting him in his Lab on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Spoken Like a True Devil
achievements.description: Re-secure Dr. Kirk and endure his villainous speech on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Dr. Regina, PhD
achievements.description: Steal the identity of Dr. Kirk
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Some Assembly Required
achievements.description: For the third choice, follow Rick's plan and build the parts required to operate the Third Energy Generator on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: If It Ain't Broke...
achievements.description: For the third choice, follow Gail's plan and grab ready-made parts for the Third Energy Generator on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Hey, We Just Built This!
achievements.description: Cause the Third Energy Generator to overload and clear your escape path on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Ooooo, Shiny!
achievements.description: For the final choice, assist Rick and survive the final T-Rex encounter at the Port while obtaining the Recovery Aid, without circling the Port or firing more than 6 shots on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: All for Nothing
achievements.description: Complete the assignment without accomplishing your mission on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Bonus Situation
achievements.description: For the final choice, assist Gail and apprehend Dr. Kirk, uncovering your team's secret mission on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: The Professional
achievements.description: Complete the assignment and fulfil your secret mission on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Fine, I'll Do It Myself
achievements.description: For the final choice, assist Rick by sending him and Gail to the Port and personally apprehending Dr. Kirk before he escapes on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: By the Book
achievements.description: Complete the assignment and achieve mission success with minimal casualties on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Just a Quick Detour
achievements.description: For the final choice, assist Gail and locate the helicopter before apprehending Dr. Kirk on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Crisis, What Crisis?
achievements.description: Complete the assignment having unknowingly accomplished both missions with minimal casualties on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: The Apex Predator
achievements.description: Defeat the underground T-Rex during any best ending without breaking a sweat: take no damage, remain stationary, and use 6 or fewer shots on Normal difficulty without the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: I Should've Packed One of These
achievements.description: Obtain the Franchi PA3 on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Dino Goes Bada Boom
achievements.description: Obtain the 40mm HK Grenade Pistol on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Thanks, I Still Hate It...
achievements.description: Upgrade your Glock 34 into a Glock 35 on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Just Like That Movie!
achievements.description: Upgrade your Franchi PA3 into a Franchi SPAS-12 on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Dino Goes Big Bada Boom
achievements.description: Upgrade the 40mm HK Grenade Pistol into the Custom Grenade Gun on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Master Alchemist
achievements.description: Make a Poison Dart using the MIX function on Normal difficulty without having the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: I've Seen It All
achievements.description: Watch all 3 endings
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Say No to Matching Outfits
achievements.description: Unlock the Army Type and Battle Type costumes by beating the game
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Flinstones Cosplay
achievements.description: Unlock the Ancient Type costume by beating the game twice
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Alternate Timeline
achievements.description: Unlock Operation Wipeout by beating the game in under 5 hours
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Pre-Historic Tech
achievements.description: Shoot a grenade from a fish's mouth
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Triassic Extinction
achievements.description: Beat Mission 1 of Operation Wipeout
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Jurassic Extinction
achievements.description: Beat Mission 2 of Operation Wipeout
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Cretacious Extinction
achievements.description: Beat Mission 3 of Operation Wipeout
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: You're Extinct!
achievements.description: Beat Operation Wipeout in under 8 minutes and 30 seconds
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: The Ultimate Survivor
achievements.description: Beat the game on Normal difficulty without using continues, without acquiring additional weapons, without retrieving the Glock 34 from the Large Size Elevator and without the Infinite Grenades
achievements.author: gde
